summary: Governed schizophrenia gene rescue task that freezes glutamatergic candidates against the shipped atlas convergence-hub framing so downstream rescue work consumes only checked-in frozen hub-state artifacts.

artifact_contracts.description: Frozen glutamatergic convergence-hub and axis-membership features captured on or before the rescue cutoff.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be materialized only from the checked-in pre-cutoff convergence-hub snapshot and must not re-open raw atlas sources or post-cutoff adjudications.

artifact_contracts.description: Held-out post-cutoff rescue review outcomes for the frozen glutamatergic candidate set.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May close after the rescue cutoff but must never flow back into ranking-input construction, split assignment, or feature tuning.

artifact_contracts.description: Ordered rescue predictions emitted by a future glutamatergic convergence task runner.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be derived only from the frozen ranking-input artifact declared by this contract and must not embed hidden post-cutoff labels.

artifact_contracts.description: Optional operator metadata documenting the intended cutoff, evaluation window, and rescue scope.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May describe rescue scope and review process but must not summarize post-cutoff label outcomes beyond what the frozen evaluation dataset exposes.

leakage_boundary.notes: PR-40 and PR-40A governance stays intact here: downstream rescue work must validate the checked-in task card, dataset cards, freeze manifest, split manifest, and lineage before it can read the frozen glutamatergic convergence lane.

notes: PR-43 must load only the frozen CSV artifacts referenced by the task card under data/curated/rescue_tasks/glutamatergic_convergence/ and must not read data/raw/rescue/ or atlas source tables directly.
